channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Les origines du Monde ne sont-elles ouvertes aux scientifiques que quand ils sont aussi des poètes ? Partie II
item.description: Voici la seconde partie de l'article que nous avons consacré au dernier ouvrage de Jean-Pierre Luminet, une anthologie inédite sur les discours philosophiques, théories scientifiques et créations poétiques tentant d'éclaircir les mystères des origines du Monde, leurs arcanes et leurs raisons....

item.title: RTX 5090, 64 Go de RAM et Core Ultra 9 : ce PC portable Asus ROG Strix à la configuration démesurée perd 1 000 € lors des soldes
item.description: Chez E.Leclerc, l'Asus ROG Strix de 18 pouces passe sous les 5 000 euros, mais conserve son SSD de 2 To et sa Nvidia GeForce RTX 5090.

item.title: Why Wall Street thinks US memory maker Micron is the next Nvidia
item.description: Eager to find more public AI-related companies that may do as well as Nvidia, Wall Street investors think they've found a winner with Micron.

item.title: Prosecutors used ChatGPT logs as evidence in the Palisades fire trial
item.description: Jonathan Rinderknecht was facing arson charges for setting a fire on New Year's Day in 2025, which became one of the deadliest wildfires in LA history. To make their case, prosecutors turned to location data from his iPhone, security camera footage, and witness testimony. But they also turned to his ChatGPT logs. Prosecutors said that […]

item.title: Govee’s smart nugget ice maker makes every iced drink feel like a luxury
item.description: For some people, the ice in a beverage is almost as important as the drink itself. That’s the audience Govee had in mind when designing its latest ice maker, the GoveeLife Smart Nugget Ice Maker Pro. This $500 premium smart home gadget is aimed at those who crave what’s called “the good ice,” the soft, chewable […]

item.title: On a testé le nouveau Xpeng G9 : le SUV électrique s’offre une recharge encore plus rapide, mais oublie des défauts gênants
item.description: Le Xpeng G9 Performance 2025 a rapidement succédé au millésime 2024 avec lequel le constructeur chinois s'est lancé en France. Outre sa nouvelle batterie capable de se recharger en 12 minutes, que devient ce "SUV de luxe intelligent" dont on regrettait le potentiel sous exploité ? Réponse après une semaine et 1000 km à son volant.

item.title: Missed Prime Day? Best Buy's rival sale is still live, and I'm rounding up the best deals on OLED TVs, AirPods, cheap laptops, and more
item.description: While Prime Day is over, Best Buy's competing Tech Fest sale is still live, and I'm rounding up the best deals on TVs, AirPods, laptops, smartwatches, and more.

item.title: SpaceX could be planning to offer a Starlink mobile network for consumers, reports say — but some experts think it's pie in the sky
item.description: A new report sheds more light on a potential mobile network offering from SpaceX, though it's not clear how it would work.

item.title: Flock cameras track more than your license plate, and they're spreading fast
item.description: Mounting privacy and security issues have residents and activists concerned.

item.title: Prix cassé pour la Samsung Galaxy Watch 7 avec 45 % de remise pendant les soldes d’été
item.description: E.Leclerc profite de l'existence de la Watch 8 et des soldes d'été pour casser le prix de la Samsung Galaxy Watch 7. Actuellement, elle est affichée à 189 euros, soit une remise de 45 %.
